description: Style Notegliders is a brand that prides itself on providing comfort, style and durability at prices that don& rsquo t burn a hole in your pocket. This pair of floaters with its bright coloured footbed scores high on all the aforementioned criteria. Pair it with a graphic T-shirt and cargos for your weekend getaway. Product Details Round toed floaters with forefoot straps and ankle loops that have Velcro closures and pull-up loopNubs and tan stitch detail on strapsMesh detail on ankle strapBranding on footbed and ankle strapDotted texturing on mustard footbedTPU outsole with aggressive grooves and nubsMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
